Abuse_Finder.name: Abuse Finder
Abuse_Finder.description: Abuse Finder identifies abuse contacts for domain names, URLs, IP addresses, and email addresses, enabling rapid incident reporting and takedown requests

AbuseIPDB.name: AbuseIPDB
AbuseIPDB.description: AbuseIPDB is a crowdsourced IP reputation database that helps identify and track malicious IPs involved in attacks, providing confidence scores and abuse reports for rapid threat assessment and blocking decisions

AMPforEndpoints.name: Cisco Secure Endpoint (Formerly AMP for Endpoints)

AWSLambda.name: AWS Lambda
AWSLambda.description: AWS Lambda is a serverless compute service that lets you run code in response to events, used as a responder backend for automated incident response actions

Capa.name: CAPA
Capa.description: CAPA (FLARE Capability Analysis) is a malware analysis tool that automatically identifies malware capabilities and behaviors by detecting common techniques and functions, helping analysts quickly understand what malware can do during reverse engineering and incident response

Censys.name: Censys
Censys.description: Internet-wide scanning platform for discovering exposed assets and monitoring attack surfaces

CERTatPassiveDNS.name: CERT.AT pDNS
CERTatPassiveDNS.description: CERT.AT pDNS is not a public service. It is only available for national / governmental CERTs in good standing with CERT.AT. For access, you have to get in contact with CERT.AT.

CheckPointHEC.name: Check Point HEC
CheckPointHEC.description: Check Point Harmony Email & Collaboration (HEC) is a cloud email security solution protecting Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace against phishing, malware, and business email compromise

ClamAV.name: ClamAV
ClamAV.description: Open-source antivirus engine for detecting trojans, viruses, malware, and other malicious threats

CortexXSOAR.name: PAN Cortex XSOAR
CortexXSOAR.description: Cortex XSOAR is Palo Alto Networks' SOAR platform that enables security teams to automate incident response workflows, orchestrate security tools, and accelerate threat investigation and remediation

Crowdsec.name: CrowdSec
Crowdsec.description: CrowdSec is a collaborative security platform that aggregates attack data from community-deployed sensors to identify malicious IPs and attack patterns, enabling real-time blocking decisions and threat intelligence sharing for collective defense

CrowdstrikeFalcon.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
CrowdstrikeFalcon.description: CrowdStrike Falcon is a cloud-native endpoint protection platform that provides real-time threat detection, prevention, and response capabilities

CuckooSandbox.name: Cuckoo Sandbox
CuckooSandbox.description: Open-source automated malware analysis system for detonating suspicious files in isolated environments (project inactive)

DomainTools.name: DomainTools
DomainTools.description: Domain and DNS intelligence platform for investigating domain ownership, infrastructure, and threat actor attribution

Duo_Security.name: Cisco Duo
Duo_Security.description: Multi-factor authentication and secure access platform by Cisco for identity verification and endpoint trust

Elasticsearch.name: Elasticsearch
Elasticsearch.description: Elasticsearch is a distributed search and analytics engine that powers SIEM solutions and log analysis platforms, enabling analysts to query and correlate security events, logs, and threat data across enterprise infrastructure during incident investigations

EmailRep.name: EmailRep
EmailRep.description: EmailRep analyzes email addresses to detect disposable emails, spam sources, and malicious senders by providing reputation scores and threat intelligence, helping analysts assess email-based threats during investigations

GoogleThreatIntelligence.name: Google Threat Intelligence
GoogleThreatIntelligence.description: Google Threat Intelligence (formerly VirusTotal) provides comprehensive malware analysis, threat intelligence, and file/URL/domain reputation data from 70+ security engines, enabling rapid threat assessment and IOC validation during investigations

GreyNoise.name: GreyNoise
GreyNoise.description: Filter noise from IP observables. Determine if IPs are benign internet scanners or targeted threats to reduce false positives in your cases

GRR.name: GRR Rapid Response
GRR.description: Open-source remote live forensics framework for incident response and remote investigation at scale

HIBP.name: Have I Been Pwned
HIBP.description: Have I Been Pwned tracks billions of compromised credentials from data breaches, allowing analysts to verify if emails or passwords have been exposed in known breaches during security investigations and incident response

Hunterio.name: Hunter.io
Hunterio.description: Hunter.io discovers and verifies email addresses associated with domains, enabling investigators to identify organizational contacts, validate email authenticity, and map corporate infrastructure during threat intelligence gathering

HybridAnalysis.name: Hybrid Analysis
HybridAnalysis.description: Hybrid Analysis (Falcon Sandbox) is a free malware analysis service powered by CrowdStrike that executes suspicious files in sandbox environments, providing detailed behavioral analysis, IOCs, and threat intelligence for malware investigations

InsightConnect.name: Rapid7 InsightConnect
InsightConnect.description: Rapid7 InsightConnect is a security orchestration and automation platform that enables security teams to automate workflows, connect security tools, and accelerate incident response through pre-built integrations and custom automation

IPinfo.name: IPinfo
IPinfo.description: IPinfo provides comprehensive IP address intelligence including geolocation, ASN ownership, company details, and hosted domains, enabling analysts to quickly profile network infrastructure and identify suspicious connections

Kafka.name: Apache Kafka
Kafka.description: Apache Kafka is a distributed event streaming platform for high-performance data pipelines, streaming analytics, and data integration.

Maltiverse.name: Maltiverse
Maltiverse.description: Maltiverse is a threat intelligence platform that aggregates and enriches IOCs from multiple sources, providing contextualized intelligence on IPs, domains, URLs, and files to accelerate threat hunting and incident response

MalwareBazaar.name: MalwareBazaar
MalwareBazaar.description: MalwareBazaar by Abuse.ch is a community-driven malware sample repository that enables analysts to query, download, and share malware samples with hash-based lookups for rapid threat identification and malware family correlation

Mattermost.name: Mattermost
Mattermost.description: Mattermost is an open-source messaging platform for team collaboration, offering channels, direct messaging, and integrations.

MaxMind.name: MaxMind
MaxMind.description: MaxMind provides geolocation and network intelligence data that maps IP addresses to geographic locations, ISPs, and network types, enabling analysts to identify attack origins and detect anomalous access patterns during investigations

MISP.name: MISP
MISP.description: MISP is an open-source threat intelligence platform for sharing, storing and correlating Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) and threat intelligence data, enabling collaborative defense and rapid incident response

MnemonicPDNS.name: Mnemonic Passive DNS
MnemonicPDNS.description: Mnemonic Passive DNS provides historical DNS resolution data that helps analysts track domain infrastructure changes, identify malicious domain rotation patterns, and investigate threat actor infrastructure during incident investigations

MSDefenderEndpoints.name: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
MSDefenderEndpoints.description: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint is an enterprise EDR platform that provides threat detection, investigation, and automated response capabilities across Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android devices for comprehensive endpoint security

MSDefenderOffice365.name: Microsoft Defender for Office 365
MSDefenderOffice365.description: Microsoft Defender for Office 365 provides advanced threat protection for email and collaboration tools, detecting phishing, malware, and business email compromise attempts with automated investigation and response capabilities

MSEntraID.name: Microsoft Entra ID
MSEntraID.description: Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure Active Directory) is an enterprise identity and access management platform that provides user authentication data, sign-in logs, and security insights to investigate account compromises, suspicious access patterns, and identity-based attacks

MSTeams.name: Microsoft Teams
MSTeams.description: Microsoft Teams is a collaboration platform that combines chat, video meetings, file storage, and application integration.

n8n.name: n8n
n8n.description: n8n is a low-code/no-code workflow automation platform that enables technical teams to build, deploy, and manage complex automated workflows.

Nessus.name: Nessus
Nessus.description: Vulnerability scanner by Tenable for identifying vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and compliance issues

Okta.name: Okta
Okta.description: Enterprise identity and access management platform providing SSO, MFA, and lifecycle management

Onyphe.name: ONYPHE
Onyphe.description: ONYPHE is a cyber defense search engine that collects and analyzes internet-wide scan data, providing intelligence on exposed assets, vulnerabilities, and threat actor infrastructure for proactive defense and incident investigation

OpenCTI.name: OpenCTI
OpenCTI.description: Open-source cyber threat intelligence platform for structuring, storing, and visualizing threat data using STIX

OTXQuery.name: AlienVault OTX
OTXQuery.description: AlienVault Open Threat Exchange (OTX) is a collaborative threat intelligence platform where security researchers share IOCs, attack patterns, and threat data, enabling community-driven defense and rapid threat validation

OvhCloud.name: OVHcloud
OvhCloud.description: OVHcloud is a European cloud provider offering dedicated servers, public cloud, web hosting, and domain services with a focus on data sovereignty

PhishTank.name: PhishTank
PhishTank.description: Verify URL observables against community-reported phishing sites. Confirm if URLs in your cases are part of known phishing campaigns

Proofpoint.name: Proofpoint
Proofpoint.description: Proofpoint is an enterprise email security and threat protection platform that provides advanced threat detection, URL defense, and forensic analysis capabilities

RecordedFuture.name: Recorded Future
RecordedFuture.description: Recorded Future is a real-time threat intelligence platform that analyzes data from the open web, dark web, and technical sources to provide predictive insights, risk scores, and actionable intelligence for proactive threat detection

Redis.name: Redis
Redis.description: Redis is an in-memory data store used as a database, cache, and message broker.

Shodan.name: Shodan
Shodan.description: Shodan is the search engine for internet-connected devices, providing reconnaissance data on exposed services, vulnerabilities, and infrastructure that helps identify attack surfaces, compromised systems, and threat actor infrastructure

Shuffle.name: Shuffle
Shuffle.description: Shuffle is an open-source security orchestration, automation and response (SOAR) platform that automates repetitive security tasks, orchestrates incident response workflows, and integrates security tools to accelerate threat detection and remediation

Slack.name: Slack
Slack.description: Slack is a is a team collaboration platform that provides channels, direct messaging, file sharing, and an app ecosystem for workflows and incident response.

Splunk.name: Splunk
Splunk.description: Splunk is a leading SIEM platform that aggregates, indexes, and analyzes machine data from across the enterprise, enabling real-time threat detection, security analytics, and incident investigation through powerful search and correlation capabilities

Telegram.name: Telegram
Telegram.description: Telegram is a cloud-based messaging platform that enables real-time security alerts, incident notifications, and team collaboration during security operations with bot-based automation and secure communication channels

ThreatConnect.name: ThreatConnect
ThreatConnect.description: ThreatConnect is a threat intelligence platform that enables security teams to aggregate, analyze, and operationalize threat data for improved security operations and incident response

URLhaus.name: URLhaus
URLhaus.description: URLhaus is a community-driven platform by Abuse.ch for tracking and sharing malware distribution URLs, providing real-time intelligence on malicious domains and payload delivery infrastructure used in active campaigns

Urlscan.io.name: URLScan.io
Urlscan.io.description: URLScan.io is an automated web scanner that analyzes URLs and websites in real-time, capturing screenshots, network traffic, and behavioral indicators to identify phishing, malware distribution, and suspicious web content

Velociraptor.name: Velociraptor
Velociraptor.description: Velociraptor is an advanced digital forensics and incident response (DFIR) platform that enables endpoint visibility, remote forensic collection, and threat hunting at scale across enterprise environments for rapid investigation and evidence gathering

Virusshare.name: VirusShare
Virusshare.description: VirusShare is a malware sample repository containing over 110 million samples, providing researchers and analysts access to malware specimens for analysis and signature development

VirusTotal.name: VirusTotal
VirusTotal.description: VirusTotal is a comprehensive malware analysis platform aggregating results from 70+ antivirus engines and security tools, enabling rapid file, URL, domain, and IP reputation checks during incident investigations

Wazuh.name: Wazuh
Wazuh.description: Open-source security monitoring platform for threat detection, integrity monitoring, incident response, and compliance

Yara.name: YARA
Yara.description: YARA is a pattern matching engine for malware identification and classification that enables analysts to create rules describing malware families and threat patterns, facilitating rapid malware detection and threat hunting during investigations

Zscaler.name: Zscaler
Zscaler.description: Cloud-native security platform providing secure web gateway, zero trust network access, and cloud security
